allow: Bash(npx -y shadcn@latest add button input textarea label radio-group badge card alert dialog separator sonner --yes --overwrite)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.ProcessName -match "python|uvicorn"} | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle, Path)

PowerShell($path = "D:\\nutzlock-tracker\\server\\data\\nutzlock_tracker.db"; $handles = & "$env:SystemRoot\\System32\\openfiles.exe" /query /fo csv 2>&1 | Select-String "nutzlock_tracker.db"; if \($handles\) { $handles } else { "No process listed via openfiles.exe — may need elevation or sysinternals handle.exe" })
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.ProcessName -match "python|uvicorn|node|sqlite"} | Format-Table Id, ProcessName, StartTime, Path -AutoSize)

PowerShell($uvPath = Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages" -Filter "uv.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($uvPath\) { Write-Host "Found uv at: $\($uvPath.FullName\)"; $env:Path = "$\($uvPath.DirectoryName\);$env:Path"; & $uvPath.FullName --version } else { Write-Host "uv.exe not found in WinGet packages" })
